name: harry
description: Personal engineering workflow plugin: resident philosophy (correctness > cost, no legacy), tiered discipline, and a brainstorm -> plan -> execute -> finish pipeline, distilled from Superpowers + ponytail and fused with multi-model review/debate.

provider.title: Backend provider
provider.description: Which backend powers harry's agent commands (ask/review/fix): "codex" or "copilot". Leave empty for auto — prefer Codex, fall back to Copilot. Exposed to the companion as CLAUDE_PLUGIN_OPTION_PROVIDER; unrecognised values fall through to auto.
